reviews.comment:
Xq es familiar limpio buenos lugares de refriguerio y comida buen hotel lastima que falta aire acondicionado  observacion las costas de la playa almejas muriendo o muertas hay que estudiar xq otros años fue pescados muertos de la misma especie para.mi cuando la ria esta revuelta esta contaminada x el rio

(Translated by Google)
Because it's family-friendly, clean, has good places for snacks and food, and is a good hotel. It's a shame it lacks air conditioning. Note: On the beach shores, clams are dying or dead; this needs to be investigated because in other years, dead fish of the same species were found. For me, when the estuary is turbulent, it's contaminated by the river.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnM2MtN1lBEAE

reviews.comment:
Son muy ordenados y educados. La falencia que no les corresponde a los empleados es que los automovilistas pisan la senda peatonal y. La gente debe transitar por la calzada

(Translated by Google)
They are very organized and polite. The problem, which is not the employees' fault, is that drivers are driving on the crosswalk. Pedestrians should be walking in the road.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Muy organizados a pesar q había 3 cuadras de cola atendieron muy rapido. Le faltaria una gomeria y lubricentro las 24hs es temporada.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Very organized; even though there was a three-block-long line, they served customers very quickly. They could use a 24-hour tire and lube shop, especially during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNV8tWWZ3EAE
